AUTO CAT FEEDER

AUTO
CAT FEEDER

Automatic feeding system based on cat face recognition using P-HOG feature extraction and K-Nearest Neighbor classification — personalizing diet for each cat by age and nutritional needs.

ICP 2023 · PUBLISHED Computer Vision P-HOG · KNN IoT · Feeding Automation Python · OpenCV UTY Informatics

marchel@sys:~$ cat ./abstract.md
ABSTRACT.MD

The 2021 Javanese Script Congress wasn't the only problem Marchel was solving. At home, 7 cats of different ages needed different food portions — but manual feeding was inconsistent.

This project builds an automatic cat feeder that identifies each cat by face using Pyramid HOG (P-HOG) feature extraction and classifies them with K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN), then dispenses the correct portion based on each cat's age-specific dietary requirements.

Dataset of 86 images across 7 cats — photographed by Marchel himself using iPad 9th Generation (12MP, 3264×2448px).

PROJECT.JSON
PROJECT:Auto Cat Feeder
INSTITUTION:University of Technology Yogyakarta
LECTURER:Dr. Enny Itje Sela, S.Kom.M.Sc.
STUDENT ID:5200411552
YEAR:2023
ALGORITHM:P-HOG + K-NN
BEST K:K = 1 (95% accuracy)
DATASET:86 images · 7 classes
CAMERA:iPad 9th Gen · 31mm f/2.4 · 12MP
SCALES:4 pyramid levels (P-HOG)
DISTANCE:Euclidean Distance (KNN)
marchel@sys:~$ ls ./features/ --verbose
◈
P-HOG Recognition
Pyramid Histogram of Oriented Gradients captures facial features at multiple scales (4 levels), making it robust to distance and angle variations in cat faces.
⊞
Age-Based Portioning
Each cat is identified individually. The system then cross-references their age profile to dispense the correct nutritional portion — no more manual guessing.
◎
K-NN Classification
K-Nearest Neighbor with Euclidean Distance tested across K = 1, 3, 5, 7, 9 and even/odd values. K=1 achieved the highest accuracy of 95% on test images.

marchel@sys:~$ open ./architecture/phog_diagram.png
P-HOG ARCHITECTURE DIAGRAM
HOW P-HOG WORKS

Standard HOG computes gradient magnitudes and orientations in a 3×3 pixel block. P-HOG extends this by building a pyramid of scales — the same face is analyzed at 4 different resolutions.

◆ Gradient: Gx = I(r,c+1) − I(r,c−1)
◆ Magnitude: √(Gx² + Gy²)
◆ Orientation: |tan⁻¹(Gy/Gx)|
◆ Bins normalized across 36 orientations
◆ 4 pyramid levels = richer spatial context
◆ KNN distance via Euclidean metric
P-HOG PYRAMID VISUALIZATION
marchel@sys:~$ python eval.py --model phog_knn --report
KNN ACCURACY BY K VALUE
K ValueTypeAccuracyBar
K = 1Odd95%
K = 2Even80%
K = 3Odd85%
K = 4Even75%
K = 5Odd85%
K = 7Odd80%
K = 9Odd80%
◆ Odd K values consistently outperform even K. K=1 achieves peak accuracy of 95%.

ICP 2023 RESEARCH POSTER — INFORMATICS UTY
marchel@sys:~$ cat ./conclusion.txt
CONCLUSION.TXT

The P-HOG + KNN system demonstrates a viable solution for personalized, automated cat feeding.
By recognizing each cat individually, it eliminates manual inconsistency
and provides age-appropriate nutrition with 95% identification accuracy at K=1.

Future work: real-time video stream integration · servo motor dispenser · mobile app dashboard · expanded multi-cat household dataset
